tasks.description: Upgrade PhotoAlbum solution (PhotoAlbum and PhotoAlbum.Tests) from .NET 9.0 to .NET 10.0
tasks.reason: .NET 9.0 is a Standard-Term Support (STS) release with a shorter support lifecycle ending in May 2026. The user has explicitly requested an upgrade to .NET 10.0, the next Long-Term Support (LTS) release offering 3 years of mainstream support, improved performance, and access to the latest platform features and security updates.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade both projects in the PhotoAlbum solution from net9.0 to net10.0, including updating the TargetFramework in each .csproj file, updating all 9.0.x NuGet package references to their 10.0.x equivalents (Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory), and resolving any breaking API changes between .NET 9 and .NET 10.
